meaning: n.璁や负鏈夌悊,璁や负姝ｅ綋,鐞嗙敱,杈╂姢,閲婄姜
examples: His justification for the merger was just hot air.
All I can say in justification of her actions is that she was under a lot of pressure at work.
Reverse spelling (crumb for crum, a word in which b has no justification) is also a trivial mistake.
It calls for scientific justification before stopping and then reversing the growth of greenhouse gases.
Feeling threatened will not provide proper justification to shut down these daily fantasy sports websites.
